properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v1 v3 v1 v4 v1

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: All of me, take all of me Here's my life as an offering I will serve you faithfully Here I am, Lord take all of me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Nothing less than everything Will I give to you my king You gave all at Calvary So here I am, Please take all of me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No reserve and no retreat Till I fall down at your feet Faithful to your call I'll be So use me Lord, you have all of me

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Where you lead me I will follow Where you send me I will go I will tell the world that's dying That you blood can make them whole
